pages.text:
On the way home we had lunch at Cloverley Hall, Whitchurch. V. pleasant. Evangelical. Where do we plan the family weekend away for St. George's.
      We got home at 2.15. on the Sunday. Charles is having to learn to take it in turns when sitting in the front seat.

April 21st.  →__Beauchamp House__ for Simon & Peter to join in a strings course. They are both enjoying it. Simon particularly the quartet work.
      There is a family called Yates – father & 2 children – from Park Hill Rd, Harborne, parked next to us.
      Eve arrived later in the morning with William, John & Charles, after dropping Thomas at Trimpley.
      It's quite cold, but pleasant sitting
